exemplar.title: Running an Instagram account in which I tell about Spanish culture and language

detailedExemplarData.title: Running an Instagram account in which I tell about Spanish culture and language

strengths: Clear, detailed example of applying communication skills with a tutor, supported by a screenshot
Demonstrated effective research skills through critical source evaluation and selective use of credible materials
Strong use of creative thinking to refine contentâiterating designs and removing underperforming posts
Robust self-management strategies, including Pomodoro technique and contingency planning, evidenced by a detailed daily schedule screenshot
weaknesses: Source-evaluation table lacks explanation of how each source informed specific content improvements
Summary of ATL skills used for the learning goal is too general and needs concrete examples
Inquiry questions and answers are not explicitly linked to how insights shaped the final product design
Additional detail needed on how each ATL skill directly impacted the quality or outcome of the product
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your application of ATL skills is **well-evidenced**, particularly in communication, research, creative thinking, and self-management. Visual artifacts strengthen your reflections. To maximize impact, explicitly connect source insights and inquiry outcomes to product development, and illustrate how each ATL skill tangibly influenced quality and effectiveness.

strengths: Detailed, sequenced action plan with clear resources and links to success criteria
Thorough justification of project choice grounded in personal interests and concrete experiences
Compelling articulation of connection between project and passion for culture and language
Comprehensive, measurable success-criteria table linking specifications, reasons, and testing methods
weaknesses: Early introduction lacks integrated, measurable success criteria to guide the process
Learning objectives outline key skills without specific performance targets or measurable benchmarks
Action plan step 5 description is incomplete and needs a clear action and expected result
Product goal statement would benefit from defined performance indicators (e.g., posting frequency, engagement metrics)
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Overall, your planning demonstrates a **well-structured and feasible roadmap**, underpinned by a strong personal rationale and a robust success-criteria framework. The detailed sequencing and resource mapping are major strengths. To elevate your plan further, integrate measurable targets from the outset, complete all action descriptions, and specify performance metrics to allow for objective evaluation.

strengths: Thoughtful mapping of IB Learner Profile traits to concrete project actions, deepening self-awareness
Systematic product evaluation against each success criterion, supported by specific evidence
Effective integration of peer survey results and constructive criticism into the reflection
Nuanced personal reflection highlighting traits such as âReflectiveâ and âThinkerâ in context of project activities
weaknesses: Reflection on personal growth (empathy, confidence) is not explicitly tied to particular tasks or outcomes
Rating chart lacks connection to objective data or external feedback sources
Insights on global context are insightful but need specific examples of influence on content choices
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your reflective practice is **rich and comprehensive**, showcasing robust self-awareness and thorough product appraisal. The incorporation of external feedback adds depth. Strengthen your reflections by linking personal growth insights and global-context understanding directly to specific project tasks and by anchoring self-ratings in observable data or feedback.

annotations.comment: Your action plan is detailed with clear sequencing, resources, and connections to success criteria, demonstrating a feasible roadmap for project implementation.
You articulate personal growth in empathy and confidence, but connecting these insights to specific project tasks would deepen the reflection on learning impact.
The rating chart provides your subjective ratings, but linking these to explicit data or feedback would strengthen the rigour of your evaluation.
Your table outlines source evaluation and use but could be strengthened by detailing how each source informed specific content or improved post quality.
You provide a thorough account of selecting your project idea with clear links to personal interests; these detailed examples strengthen your justification of choice.

Your introduction outlines initial challenges and idea generation, but it lacks clear success criteria linking back to specified goals; consider integrating measurable criteria early to guide your process.
Your learning objectives identify key skills (language, design, self-management), but they would benefit from specific, measurable success criteria to assess progress effectively.
You articulate a compelling connection between the project and your passion for culture and language, using concrete personal experiences to justify your focus.
This success criteria table is comprehensive and measurable, linking specifications, reasons, and testing methodsâan excellent foundation for evaluating your product.
In your action plan, ensure all step descriptions are complete and clearly linked to outcomes; step 5 appears truncated and needs a full action description and expected result.
Your product goal statement is clear but would benefit from specific performance targets (e.g., post frequency, follower metrics) to make evaluation more objective.
This summary of ATL skills lists the skills used but lacks specific examples of how each skill directly contributed to achieving your learning goal.
You give a clear, detailed example of applying communication skills with your tutor, illustrating punctuality and responsivenessâstrong evidence of skill use.
Including a screenshot of your tutor conversation provides tangible evidence of effective communication, reinforcing your reflections.
Your discussion of research skill demonstrates critical source evaluation and selective use of credible materials, showing effective application of this ATL skill.
The list of inquiry questions and answers is extensive but lacks a clear link to how insights influenced your product design; explicitly connect these responses to post development.
You effectively describe using creative thinking to refine contentâremoving underperforming posts and iterating designsâshowing strong application of thinking skills to improve quality.
Your self-management narrative, including the Pomodoro method and contingency planning, illustrates robust time-management strategies applied during the project.
The screenshot of your detailed daily schedule offers concrete evidence of self-management, reinforcing your narrative with visual proof.
You continue to link traits like âReflectiveâ and âThinkerâ with project activities; this deepens your self-awareness and shows nuanced personal reflection.
Mapping IB Learner Profile traits to concrete actions shows thoughtful reflection on personal growth, connecting attributes to your project experiences.
Your reflection on global context demonstrates insight into identity and relationships, but consider adding specific examples of how this understanding influenced your content choices.
Your product evaluation systematically addresses each success criterion with evidence and self-assessment, showing thorough reflective appraisal.
Incorporating peer survey results and constructive criticism shows an effective use of external feedback, enriching your reflective process.
